title: Long Video Generation (LVG) Inference
description: User requests generation of extended-length multi-view video via video extension pipeline (LVG). Conditioned on initial input frames and per-camera text prompts, the system extends video across multiple views using a diffusion denoising loop.

actors.name: User
actors.description: Provides input video/image and per-view text prompts via CLI or API

actors.name: Guardrail
actors.description: Safety/content filter for input prompts and generated video

actors.name: TextEncoder
actors.description: T5-based encoder converting per-view text prompts to embeddings

actors.name: VAE/Tokenizer
actors.description: Video encoder/decoder (encode to latent, decode to pixel video)

use_cases.name: Submit LVG Inference Request
use_cases.description: User provides input image/video path, per-camera prompts (front, left, right, back, back-left, back-right), and generation params (height, width, fps, num_video_frames, num_input_frames, guidance, num_steps, seed) via video2world_multiview.py demo() / CLI args

use_cases.name: Validate Inputs & Check Guardrails
use_cases.description: validate_args() checks args consistency. Guardrail model screens input prompt and (optionally) generated video. If blocked, pipeline.generate() returns None and generation is skipped.

use_cases.name: Encode Per-View Text Prompts
use_cases.description: _run_text_embedding_on_prompt_with_offload(prompts) encodes 6 per-camera text prompts into crossattn_emb tensors. T5 model is optionally offloaded after encoding.

use_cases.name: Encode Condition Video to Latent
use_cases.description: Load input frames (1 or 9) from image/video path. DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel.encode() rearranges B C (V T) H W → (B V) C T H W, calls tokenizer.encode(), rescales by sigma_data, returns latent condition tensor.

use_cases.name: Prepare Video Extension Condition
use_cases.description: add_condition_video_indicator_and_video_input_mask() sets condition_video_indicator (binary 1x1xTx1x1 tensor marking first_n conditioned frames), condition_video_input_mask (B,1,T,H,W channel concatenated to network input), and gt_latent on VideoExtendCondition object. Handles n_views rearrangement and context-parallel split.

use_cases.name: Run Multiview Diffusion Denoising Loop
use_cases.description: generate_samples_from_batch() initializes noise x_t ~ N(0, sigma_max). For each timestep t: (1) _augment_noise_with_latent() blends gt_latent (augmented with condition_augment_sigma) into condition region; (2) MultiviewVideoExtendGeneralDIT.forward() predicts noise — concatenates [x, condition_video_input_mask, (optional) condition_video_pose] along channel dim before super().forward(); (3) CFG: net_output = cond + guidance*(cond - uncond); (4) scheduler.step() produces x_{t-1}. Context parallel splits/gathers across V views for multi-GPU.

use_cases.name: Decode Latent to Multi-View Video
use_cases.description: DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel.decode() rearranges B C (V T) H W → (B V) C T H W, calls tokenizer.decode(latent / sigma_data), reassembles to B C (V T) H W. Produces pixel video (B,3,T,H,W).

use_cases.name: Assemble and Save Generated Video
use_cases.description: Pipeline returns [video_grid, video] (grid arranges 6 camera views into a 2×3 mosaic). save_video() writes .mp4 (individual + grid). Prompts saved to .txt. Output resolution: default 480×848 per camera, 57 frames.
use_cases.method: save_video(video, fps, H, W) — called twice (per-cam + grid)

use_cases.name: Enable Multi-GPU Context Parallel Inference
use_cases.description: If num_gpus > 1, megatron parallel_state initialized with context_parallel_size=num_gpus. pipeline.model.net.enable_context_parallel(process_group) splits temporal sequence dimension across GPUs per view. Outputs gathered via cat_outputs_cp() after denoising.

key_classes.name: MultiviewVideoExtendGeneralDIT
key_classes.role: Inference-side LVG network. Adds +1 input channel for condition mask. forward() cats [x, condition_video_input_mask, (opt) condition_video_pose] before calling super().forward().

key_classes.name: VideoExtendMultiviewGeneralDIT
key_classes.role: Training-side LVG network. Identical structure to inference counterpart.

key_classes.name: MultiviewGeneralDIT
key_classes.role: Base multiview DIT. n_views camera views, view_embeddings (nn.Embedding), MultiviewVideoRopePosition3DEmb, GeneralDITTransformerBlock with n_views. prepare_embedded_sequence() adds per-view learnable embeddings.

key_classes.name: DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel
key_classes.role: Inference model. encode/decode with view rearrangement. Orchestrates condition mask prep and denoising loop. generate_samples_from_batch() is the top-level generation method.

key_classes.name: MultiviewExtendDiffusionModel
key_classes.role: Training model. denoise() handles conditional frame injection. get_x0_fn_from_batch_with_condition_latent() builds CFG x0_fn. FSDPExtendDiffusionModel wraps with FSDP.

key_classes.name: DiffusionVideo2WorldMultiviewGenerationPipeline
key_classes.role: User-facing pipeline. generate(prompt_dict, image_or_video_path) orchestrates text encoding → condition latent encoding → _run_model() → decode → save. Uses DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel.

key_relationships: Guardrail guards UC1 input and UC8 output
important_notes: LVG = Long Video Generation / Video Extension: generates new frames conditioned on first N frames (condition_location=first_n)
6 camera views: front, left, right, back, back-left, back-right; all views processed jointly B C (V T) H W
Extra +1 channel: condition_video_input_mask concatenated to noisy input x before DIT forward pass
condition_video_augment_sigma controls noise added to conditioning frames (inference default 0.001)
Context parallel: temporal T dimension split across GPUs per view for multi-GPU scaling
Default output: 480×848 per camera, 57 frames @ 24fps; 6-view grid (2×3) also saved
CFG: guidance=7.0 default; net_output = cond + guidance*(cond - uncond) per denoising step
